authority: This file is the single source of truth for numbers (GR-1). No metric appears in prose except as a citation of this file. Keystone-only writes.

baseline.how: tr -s '[:space:]' '\n' < artifact/GUIDE.md | grep -c .  (whitespace-split tokens of the full markdown file)

coverageNote: D2/C4 backfill (2026-07-13): each fold is labelled by what its gate actually bought. CENSUS = every one of the 32 facts was probed (detection 1.0). Only the 573 fold was sample-closed; 526 and 472 were census-closed.

history.coverageNote: VALIDATED_SAMPLE: closed on an 8/32 hash-drawn gate (one independent draw); detection of a single omission = 0.25. Not census-verified.
